items.title: Linux pre-tested binary (ubu1/htz parity)
items.blocking_reason: remote host ubu1 has no `hexa` binary on PATH — script gracefully degrades and emits ENV_BLOCKED audit (does NOT fail run).
items.next_step: install hexa on ubu1/htz then re-run; expect verdict to flip to PASS.

items.title: arm64 + x86_64 universal binary
items.blocking_reason: host is arm64 macOS; x86_64 cross-build requires either `hexa build --target` (not present) or a remote x86_64 builder. Migration path is documented in audit JSON.
items.next_step: land x86_64 cross-build via ubu1 once hexa lands there (#75 complete) — or wire `lipo -create` after building each arch on its native host.

items.title: container-less runtime (no docker dependency)
items.summary: Only docker dep on critical path is config/grafana/docker-compose.yml. Migration plan P0→P3 declared. tool/ remains 100% docker-free.
items.smoke_command: grep -rln docker tool/ | grep -v container_less_runtime || echo no-docker-in-tool

items.title: CLI auto-completion (zsh: hexa + airgenome)
items.smoke_command: zsh -c 'autoload -U compinit && compinit -d /tmp/_compdump && source /Users/ghost/core/anima/shared/completions/_hexa.zsh && echo OK_hexa && source /Users/ghost/core/anima/shared/completions/_airgenome.zsh && echo OK_airgenome'

items.title: slack notify on launch verdict
items.smoke_output_observed: selftest PASS payload_bytes=220; dry mode emits payload preview without POST.

items.title: email digest weekly (text only)
items.notes: --send NOT implemented per spec. Output is stdout text. Recipient field set to user's email but no SMTP.

items.title: dashboard mobile-friendly (Grafana)
items.notes: Declares responsive grid + per-panel mobile/desktop overrides. Activated by #84 dashboard generator at boot.
